Day advanced to 2026-03-18.
11,256 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-17 -> 2026-03-18)

- "At which tournament will Lin Yu-ting be announced to return to the ring by 31 March 2026?" → Asian Boxing Championships
- "Through which place will the alleged smuggling route first send US-made AI servers before they move on to Southeast Asia, by March 2026?" → Taiwan
- "What country will receive the $8.4bn share of a newly approved US arms sale, including drones, missiles, radars and F-16 aircraft, by March 31, 2026?" → United Arab Emirates
- "By March 20, 2026, in which U.S. state will major news outlets report that Chuck Norris was hospitalized before his death?" → Hawaii
- "Which city will be identified as the site of a checkpoint attack that killed 13 members of Iran's Basij force by March 20, 2026?" → Tabriz
- "Who will Mexican authorities say they detained as the leader of the Los Mayos group inside the Sinaloa Cartel by March 19, 2026?" → Omar Oswaldo Torres

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (294 resolved, 36 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
